apps.name: GlassWalk
apps.subtitle: Liquid-glass walking tracker.
apps.localizedDescription: A beautiful walking tracker that uses your iPhone's real sensors — accurate steps, GPS route and pace, a live map that follows you, and post-walk insights. All data stays on your device.
apps.versionDescription: Live map location that follows you, plus compass heading on the route map.

versions.localizedDescription: Live map location that follows you, plus compass heading on the route map.

privacy.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Keeps tracking with the screen off.
